description: convert one or more DOIs to BibTeX via CrossRef content negotiation (doi.org)
rules: read-only — BibTeX written to record_store as references.bib
DOI may hold one DOI or several space-separated DOIs
DOI_FILE (optional) points to a file with one DOI per line
reaches doi.org over the network; porter degrades gracefully (writes {} and exits 0) when offline
usage: Set DOI (one or space-separated DOIs) and/or DOI_FILE. Output: references.bib.
limitation: Requires network access to doi.org/CrossRef. Rate-limited (0.5s between requests). Failed DOIs are skipped.
